src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest import with jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Wrap logging statements with isInfoEnabled checks to prevent unnecessary string concatenation and object serialization when logging is disabled.
Replace inline JSON serialization calls with a dedicated JsonUtil class for better code organization and reuse.
Replace direct request.getRemoteHost() call with a dedicated ClientIpUtil to handle proxy headers and complex IP extraction logic.
Refactor log message construction to use StringBuffer for better performance and clearer structure, separating request details and headers.
Update exception logging to pass the exception object to the logger for proper stack trace inclusion instead of string concatenation.
Replace explicit generic type arguments in HashMap instantiation with the diamond operator for cleaner code.
Remove unused imports and commented-out code related to java.lang.reflect.Parameter to clean up the source file.
Remove the legacy Spring Security OAuth2 authorization server configuration class that relies on deprecated `AuthorizationServerConfigurerAdapter`.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Commented out the entire `AuthorizationServerConfiguration` class extending `AuthorizationServerConfigurerAdapter`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace Spring Security OAuth2 ClientDetailsService with custom OauthClientService and ScopeDefinitionService to support dynamic client and scope definitions.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced `clientDetailsService.loadClientByClientId` with `oauthClientService.findByClientId` and added logic to fetch scope definitions via `scopeDefinitionService`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update request mapping paths to align with new controller structure and remove optional parameters.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Changed `@RequestMapping("/oauth/confirm_access")` to `@RequestMapping("/confirm_access")` under a class-level `@RequestMapping("/oauth")` and made `redirect_uri` required.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Simplify the host extraction logic by removing complex URI reconstruction and exception handling.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced the `getHost` method's `URI` constructor logic with simple string concatenation based on scheme, host, and port checks.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update the model attributes passed to the view to reflect new domain objects and remove unused data.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced `model.put("client", client)` with `model.put("applicationName", client.getApplicationName())` and removed `HttpServletRequest` dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.0.0.RELEASE to 3.0.5 to align with Java 17 ecosystem.
Update the target Java version property from 1.8 to 17.
Replace the legacy spring-security-oauth2 library with the new Spring Authorization Server module required for Spring Boot 3.
Switch from the old MySQL connector artifact to the new mysql-connector-j required for newer Spring Boot versions.
Add MapStruct dependency for object mapping.
Add Apache Commons Text dependency.
Add Spring Boot Starter Data JPA dependency.
Add Liquibase core dependency for database migrations.
Add Spring Boot Starter Security dependency explicitly.
Add Jackson JSR310 datatype for Java 8+ date/time support.
Add Lombok dependency for boilerplate reduction.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 dependency.
Add custom captcha library dependency.
Add Spring Boot Starter Cache dependency.
Add Caffeine cache implementation dependency.
Add Spring Boot Starter Actuator dependency.
Add Spring Boot DevTools dependency for development.
Configure maven-resources-plugin to prevent filtering of binary font and key files.
Configure maven-compiler-plugin with Java 17 source/target and annotation processors for Lombok and MapStruct.
Add versions-maven-plugin to manage dependency updates.
Remove explicit spring-boot-starter-logging dependency as it is included by default in Spring Boot 3.
Remove thymeleaf-extras-springsecurity4 dependency, likely migrating away from Thymeleaf or updating security integration.
Remove Guava dependency, replacing functionality with standard libraries or other deps.
Move groupId, artifactId, and version to the top level and add description.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Explicitly define server port and context path properties.
Configure the size of the scheduling task pool.
Configure file-based logging with rotation and history settings.
Enable and configure Tomcat access logs with rotation.
Update MySQL connection string to include timezone and SSL settings required for newer drivers.
Switch to the new MySQL Connector/J driver class name compatible with MySQL 8.0+.
Configure HikariCP connection pool max lifetime.
Configure JPA Hibernate settings including DDL auto and dialect.
Enable Liquibase for database schema migration.
Add application-specific configuration for sign-in limits, JWT keys, and captcha.
Add placeholder configuration for WeChat Mini Program integration.

src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.general_idea: Upgrade Bootstrap Grid CSS from version 4.0.0 to 5.2.3 to adopt modern CSS variables and grid utilities.
src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.human_impl: Replaced bootstrap-grid.css content with v5.2.3 distribution, introducing :root variables and removing IE11 flexbox prefixes.

src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.general_idea: Remove obsolete CSS vendor prefixes (e.g., -webkit-, -ms-) to modernize the stylesheet and reduce file size.
Replace physical margin/padding classes (left/right) with logical properties (start/end) to support internationalization and modern CSS standards.
Add support for the new 'xxl' extra-extra-large breakpoint introduced in Bootstrap 5.
Introduce new gutter utility classes using CSS variables for consistent spacing control.
Add display: grid utility classes to support CSS Grid layout alongside Flexbox.
Add explicit utility classes for flex-grow and flex-shrink properties.
Add utility classes for controlling the visual order of flex/grid items.
Add justify-content: space-evenly utility class for more flexible alignment options.
Replace Bootstrap 4 grid CSS with Bootstrap 5 grid CSS to adopt modern flexbox utilities and remove legacy vendor prefixes.
src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.human_impl: Removed `-webkit-box-orient` and `-ms-flex-direction` prefixes; added `xxl` breakpoint classes and `d-print-*` utilities.

src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.general_idea: Upgrade Bootstrap Grid CSS from version 4.0.0 to 5.2.3 to align with modern frontend standards.
src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.human_impl: Replaced bootstrap-grid.min.css content with v5.2.3 minified CSS.

src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.general_idea: Replace the Bootstrap grid CSS source map with a newer version (v5.2.3) to align with updated frontend dependencies.
Replace Bootstrap 4.0.0 reboot CSS with Bootstrap 5.2.3 to adopt modern CSS variables and updated reset styles.
src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.human_impl: Replaced entire content of bootstrap-reboot.css from v4.0.0 to v5.2.3
